changelog: AJAX quick-edits on ticket detail - priority, type, due date, company and assignee save instantly without page reload
Autosave for new ticket form - drafts are saved automatically and restored after page reload
Notifications now triggered for all quick-edit field changes (priority, type, company, due date)
Broadened status change notifications to all ticket participants instead of just creator and assignee
Fixed dashboard ticket counts for agents - agents now see only their assigned tickets consistently
